name: Radio
summary: Radio button group for single selection from multiple options. Use RadioGroup with RadioItem children.
criticalNotes: Always wrap in GoabFormItem for proper labeling
Use RadioGroup with RadioItem children, not standalone Radio
Use description for additional context on options

basicUsage.webComponent:
<goa-form-item label="Select payment method">
  <goa-radio-group name="payment" value="credit">
    <goa-radio-item value="credit" label="Credit card"></goa-radio-item>
    <goa-radio-item value="debit" label="Debit card"></goa-radio-item>
    <goa-radio-item value="cash" label="Cash"></goa-radio-item>
  </goa-radio-group>
</goa-form-item>
basicUsage.react:
<GoabFormItem label="Select payment method">
  <GoabRadioGroup
    name="payment"
    value={paymentMethod}
    onChange={(detail) => setPaymentMethod(detail.value)}
  >
    <GoabRadioItem value="credit" label="Credit card" />
    <GoabRadioItem value="debit" label="Debit card" />
    <GoabRadioItem value="cash" label="Cash" />
  </GoabRadioGroup>
</GoabFormItem>
basicUsage.angular:
<goab-form-item label="Select payment method">
  <goab-radio-group
    name="payment"
    [value]="paymentMethod"
    (onChange)="onPaymentChange($event)">
    <goab-radio-item value="credit" label="Credit card"></goab-radio-item>
    <goab-radio-item value="debit" label="Debit card"></goab-radio-item>
    <goab-radio-item value="cash" label="Cash"></goab-radio-item>
  </goab-radio-group>
</goab-form-item>
